title: ilex ambigua var. montana
intro: Ilex ambigua var. montana, also known as the Chinese holly or Chinese evergreen holly, is a variety of the Ilex ambigua plant native to the mountainous regions of southern China. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex ambigua var. montana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting immune function, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Ilex ambigua var. montana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
